page.title: Message Tracing
page.selectServer: Select a server to view message traces.
mode.tipLive: Live Tail shows messages flowing through the broker right now — events that arrived before the page opened are not in the buffer.
mode.tipQuery: Query searches the recorded firehose archive over a time range. Use it to investigate something that happened before you opened the page.
mode.switchToLive: Switch to Live Tail for real-time.
payload.title: Payload
payload.metadataOnly: Body not captured ({{size}}). Payload storage is coming in a future release.
properties.title: Properties
live.description: Messages will appear as they flow through the broker.
live.errorHint: The broker may be unreachable or the subscription timed out. Retrying reconnects the subscription.
query.noResults: No events in this time range.
empty.firehose.title: Firehose not active
empty.firehose.description: Enable message tracing on the broker to start capturing events. This activates the RabbitMQ Firehose on all vhosts.
empty.firehose.enableError: Failed to enable tracing. Check server connectivity.
empty.firehose.enabledSuccess: Tracing enabled. The registry will connect shortly.
empty.firehose.confirmDescription: This activates the Firehose exchange on all selected vhosts. On high-throughput brokers, it may add measurable overhead to every message. Disable tracing when you're done investigating.
empty.managementApi.title: Management API unavailable
empty.managementApi.description: The RabbitMQ Management Plugin is unreachable. Check that it is enabled and accessible on the broker.
page.errorTitle: Something went wrong loading Message Tracing.
page.errorHint: Reload the page to try again.
preview.liveBanner: Free plan preview — showing the first {{count}} events. Upgrade for unlimited live tail.
preview.queryBanner: Free plan preview — showing the most recent {{count}} events from the last 24 hours. Upgrade for full query access.
